title: The King of Pigs
posterAlt: The King of Pigs (2011) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Two friends, Jung Jong-suk and Hwang Kyung-min, meet after several years and talk about their time in school, which left them scarred.
synopsis: The King of Pigs is a 2011 animation, thriller and drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
